parameters.query:
SELECT
  t.id                       AS task_id,
  t.title                    AS task_title,
  t.target_date              AS task_due_date,
  t.status                   AS task_status,

  -- overdue calculation
  TIMESTAMPDIFF(
    DAY,
    DATE(t.target_date),
    DATE(UTC_TIMESTAMP())
  )                           AS overdue_days,

  -- responsible person (task owner)
  rp.email                   AS task_owner_email,
  rp.firstname               AS task_owner_firstname,
  rp.lastname                AS task_owner_lastname,

  -- project
  pm.id                      AS project_id,
  pm.title                   AS project_title,

  -- project manager
  pmo.email                  AS project_manager_email,
  pmo.firstname              AS project_manager_firstname,
  pmo.lastname              AS project_manager_lastname

FROM task_managements t

-- task owner (responsible person)
JOIN spree_users rp
  ON rp.id = t.responsible_person_id

-- project
JOIN project_managements pm
  ON pm.id = t.project_management_id

-- project manager
JOIN spree_users pmo
  ON pmo.id = pm.owner_id

WHERE
  DATE(t.target_date) < DATE(UTC_TIMESTAMP())   -- overdue
  AND t.status NOT IN ('completed', 'closed');  -- ignore completed tasks

mySql.name: New FM UAT Task Management Database

parameters.subject: =Task Overdue: Immediate Attention Required – {{$json.task_title}}
parameters.html: = Dear {{$json.project_manager_firstname}}, The task {{$json.task_title}} has exceeded its planned due date and is currently overdue. Overdue Details * Task Title: {{$json.task_title}} * Due Date: {{$json.task_due_date}} * Overdue By: {{$json.overdue_days}} days * Current Status: {{$json.task_status}} Please update the task with completion details or provide a revised plan to avoid escalation. Regards, PMO – Escalation Desk

parameters.subject: =Task Overdue: Immediate Attention Required – {{$json.task_title}}
parameters.html: = Dear {{$json.task_owner_firstname}} {{$json.task_owner_lastname}}, The task {{$json.task_title}} has exceeded its planned due date and is currently overdue. Overdue Details * Task Title: {{$json.task_title}} * Due Date: {{$json.task_due_date}} * Overdue By: {{$json.overdue_days}} days * Current Status: {{$json.task_status}} Please update the task with completion details or provide a revised plan to avoid escalation. Regards, PMO – Escalation Desk
